texto: When was it that they who dwell upon the earth have not sinned in thy sight? or what people have so kept thy commandments? Thou shall find that you all by name had kept thy precepts
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de but not the heathen. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “When was it that they who dwell upon the earth have not sinned in thy sight? or what people have …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, compton-gage, dwell, com foco em reflexao.
